subject: FW: serial number assignment
body:
G 650 update

Rich Kahn
New York Strategy Group LLC
457 Madison Avenue, 4th Floor
New York, NY 10021
tel 212-891-6430
fax 212-750-2408
cell 917-414-7584



-----Original Message-----
From: rick.pitner@gulfstream.com [mailto:rick.pitner@gulfstream.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, April 16, 2008 5:04 PM
To: Rich Kahn
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com; lvjet@aol.com
Subject: re: serial number assignment

Rich:

Been to south Florida today for a meeting and just getting back to the
office. We "MAY" start to hear tomorrow, but rest assured it has our
laser
focus we just have to check and recheck before proceeding. Once the
genie
is out of the bottle there will be no putting it back and we can't
afford
to move forward until all the ducks are in a row.

No problem checking in...I have seen or heard nothing, but as soon as I
do
I'll be in contact.

Thanks for your patience!

Rick

Rick Pitner
Sales Director
Gulfstream Aerospace

352-455-4877 cell
352-742-7421 office
352-742-7422 fax



This e-mail message, including all attachments, is for the sole use of
the
intended recipient(s) and may contain legally privileged and
confidential
information.  If you are not an intended recipient, you are hereby
notified
that you have either received this message in error or through
interception, and that any review, use, distribution, copying or
disclosure
of this message or its attachments is strictly prohibited and is subject
to
criminal and civil penalties.  All personal messages express solely the
sender's views and not those of Gulfstream Aerospace Corporation.  If
you
received this message in error, please contact the sender by reply
e-mail
and destroy all copies of the original message.




 

             "Rich Kahn"

             <rkahn@nysgmail.c

             om>
To 
                                       <rick.pitner@gulfstream.com>

             04/16/2008 11:22
cc 
             AM                        <DKIESQ@aol.com>, <lvjet@aol.com>

 
Subject 
                                       re: serial number assignment

 

 

 

 

 

 





As I you can tell we are very anxious for updates.
Do you know when today we might hear some news.
Thank you again for all your help.

Rich Kahn
New York Strategy Group LLC
457 Madison Avenue, 4th Floor
New York, NY 10021
tel 212-891-6430
fax 212-750-2408
cell 917-414-7584
